easter-buns-from-argyros-argiro.name: Easter Buns From Argyros

ingredients.item: 3 Tears of mastic beaten in powder
3 Tears of mastic beaten in powder

instructions: We start by acting yeast first. Dissolve it in a bowl, add the sugar and water.
Mix, cover and allow for 5-10 minutes to foam the surface, sample that the yeast is active for the teas.
If you do not find fresh yeast, you can use 4 dry yeast envelopes that will activate it as I say above.

eggplant-and-cabbage-dinner-frittata.name: Eggplant And Cabbage Dinner Frittata

ingredients.item: Of napa cabbage or 1 bunch of tuscan kale

ingredients.prep: cut crosswise into 2-inch sections, sliced into  0.5-inch-thick batons

ingredients.item: Urfa pepper or other mild red pepper flakes

instructions: Mix cucumber, chile, lime juice, half of cabbage (i.e., ¼ of the head), and one-third of scallions in a small bowl. Gently massage with your hands to soften cabbage; season with salt. Set aside.

Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a medium (heatproof if you plan to finish in oven) nonstick skillet over medium-high. Cook eggplant, tossing occasionally, until browned in spots and mostly tender, 5–6 minutes. Add onion, garlic, and remaining cabbage and cook, tossing often, until vegetables are very tender, 4–6 minutes. Transfer to a plate and let cool until just warm (about 5 minutes should do it); reserve skillet.
Whisk eggs, ginger, tamari, and remaining scallions in a medium bowl. Season with salt. Add cooked vegetables and stir to combine.

Heat remaining 1 Tbsp. oil in reserved skillet over medium-high. Add egg mixture, shaking skillet to distribute evenly. Cook until golden brown underneath but only partially set on top, about 3 minutes. Slide frittata onto a plate, then invert skillet onto plate. Firmly grip pan handle in one hand and hold plate flush against rim of skillet with the other. Quickly and confidently flip skillet and plate over so frittata lands in pan with the browned side facing up. Return to medium-high heat and cook until other side is just set, about 2 minutes more.
Transfer frittata to a plate. Top with cabbage slaw and pepper.

eggplant-parmesan-recipe-on-airfryerr-co.name: Eggplant Parmesan Recipe On Airfryerr
eggplant-parmesan-recipe-on-airfryerr-co.original_name: Receta de berenjenas a la parmesana en airfryerr

instructions: Retira el tallo de l berenjenas y cortala en rodajas.
Expand the eggplant slices onto a plate and spread throughout the salt surface. Let rest for 10 minutes so that the bitter fluid from the vegetable goes out and doesn't get oxidized.
On a deep plate, add parmesan cheese, padded bread, oregano, a touch of salt and mixture.
Bate el huevo en un recipiente hasta que quede espumoso.
Prevent airfryer at 180 ° C
Toma las rodajas de la berenjena y pasa por el huevo batido hasta que se remojen, luego por la mezcla de pan rallado y parmesano por ambos lados.
Put the slices in the bowl of the air frying and cook for 5 minutes till they are golden and crispy.
Una vez listas, retira de la freidora de aire y unta en cada rodaja de berenjena pasta o salsa de tomate.
Reds mozzarella and scatters every slice of eggplant. Roy with olive oil in spray and purple at the air fryer for 3 more minutes till the cheese melt and merge with tomato sauce.
Retira de la freidora de aire, deja reposar un rato y degusta como prefieras.
Enjoy!

eggplant-volovan-lezzet.name: Eggplant Volovan
instructions: 1. Wait at room temperature for 15 minutes to soften dough.
2. Cut two pieces from each dough with a round mold.
3. Give the ring shape by cut the 12 out of the middle with a smaller mold up to 1 cm from the edges.
4. Paste ring-shaped dough on round dough.
5. Directory to a oiled paper spread tray.
6. Remove the egg yolk with the help of brushing the edges of the dough and cook until the oven, set to 200 degrees.
7. Leave. from the oven to cool.
8. Search for eggplants in the oven grill until the iyice thoroughly softened.
9. Peel the shells and drain the water and take it in a bowl.
10. Reject garlic to it.
11. 11. Add and mix Tahin, salt, pepper, pepper.

eggplants-stuffed-with-quinoa-and-tofu-v.name: Eggplants Stuffed With Quinoa And Tofu: Vegan And Recipe
eggplants-stuffed-with-quinoa-and-tofu-v.original_name: Berenjenas rellenas de quinoa y tofu: receta vegana y fácil
instructions: Wash the eggplants and cut them in half lengthwise. With a spoon, remove his pulp and leave an edge about 1 cm. Reserve your pulp. Put the eggplants in an oven plate, brush with olive oil and baker at 180 and 3 and for 20 minutes, till they are tender.

Meanwhile, rinse the quinoa and cook it into a pot with 2 cups of water and a pinch of salt. It leads to boiling, reduces fire and cooks with low heat for 15 minutes or until water is fully absorbed. Reserve.
Pica finamente la cebolla, el ajo, la zanahoria, el pimiento y la pulpa de berenjena que retiraste antes.
In a large frying pan, heat up 2 tablespoons of olive oil and fry onion and garlic for about 3 minutes. Add carrot, pepper and eggplant pulp. Cooking at medium heat for 5-7 minutes, often stirring.

Loosen the tofu with your hands and add it to the frying pan with the baked quinoa. Add soya sauce, cumin, pimenton, black pepper and salt to suit. Cooking for another 5 minutes, well mingling all the ingredients. If the mixture is dry, add some vegetable stock to give you juicy.
Remove the eggplants from the oven and fill them with a mixture of quinoa and tofu. Give them back to the oven and baker for an additional 10 minutes so that the flavors will be integrated.
Retira del horno y decora con perejil fresco picado.

end-of-the-week-deli-sandwich.name: End-of-the-week Deli Sandwich

ingredients.prep: focaccia, or pain rustique, cut horizontally in half

ingredients.item: Pesto or roasted red pepper spread
Sliced drained peperoncini or pickled jalapeño chiles

instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C. Place bread, cut side up, on baking sheet. Mix pesto and mayonnaise in small bowl; spread over both cut sides of bread. Arrange cheese on bottom half of bread. Bake bread halves until lightly toasted, about 10 minutes. Top cheese with meats, then peperoncini, onion, tomatoes, and arugula. Cover with top half of bread. Cut lengthwise in half, then crosswise into 6 sandwiches.

energy-balls.name: Energy Balls
instructions: Combine oats, peanut butter, ground flaxseed, chocolate chips, honey, chia seeds, and vanilla extract together in a bowl. Cover and chill the dough in the refrigerator for 30 minutes.
Remove chilled dough from the refrigerator; roll into twenty 1-inch diameter balls.

enjoy-this-delicious-turkey-in-cranberry.name: Enjoy This Delicious Turkey In Cranberry Sauce
enjoy-this-delicious-turkey-in-cranberry.original_name: Disfruta este rico pavo en salsa de arándanos
instructions: Preheat the oven at 180 ° C
Take your breasts and get some light with salt, pepper, oregano and garlic powder.
Luego, corta la cebolla y filetea los dientes de ajo. Reserva.
En un bol mediano, vierte en un bol la salsa de soya y el aceite de oliva. Mezcla muy bien hasta integrar.
Put on a plate greased the seedling breasts, pour the oil and soy sauce mixture. Finally, spread garlic teeth and steamed onion.
Wet his breasts for about 40 minutes or till they are cooked and doradite.
While we're baking, we're going with the cranberry sauce.
Warm up a medium saucer, pour the red wine, cranberries, sugar and soy sauce. Cooking at low heat for 12 minutes while at once moving until the sauce forms.
Cuando, tenga textura, apagas y reserva.
Take your breasts out of the oven, cut into strips and baits with cranberry sauce.
Disfruta con tus guarniciones favoritas.

esquites.name: Esquites
instructions: Combine water and sugar in a large bowl and stir well. Add corn ears in husks and soak for at least 1 hour.
Preheat an outdoor grill for low heat with mesquite chips in the wood box. Lightly oil the grate.
Remove corn from sugar-water mixture and cook, in husks, on the preheated grill for 45 minutes. Remove corn from the grill and let cool before shucking. Cut corn kernels from cobs.

Sauté corn kernels and chili powder in a large skillet over medium heat, tossing frequently, until lightly charred, about 5 minutes. Add cotija cheese, crema, cilantro, and salt; cook until warmed through, about 4 minutes. Spritz with lime juice and serve hot.

ethnic-pizza-lezzet.name: Ethnic Pizza
instructions: 1. Eat sausage, tomatoes and peppers in the form of cube.
2. Rub the egg, yogurt and sunflower oil in the high tip of the mixer for 2 minutes.
3. Add the baking powder and flour into the mixture and continue to cook.
4. Add cube chopped cheese, sausages, tomatoes, peppers, chopped eggplants, feslean and spices and mix with wooden spoon.
5. Transfer the mixture with 28 cm lubricated clamped caliba and cook for about 45 minutes until it is fried in the oven with 180 degrees.
6. Make hot or warm service from mold to hot square way.
